name: crossbeam-permits
description: Open-source plan-check skills for every California city. 22 simple permit types per city — reroof, EV charger, water heater, HVAC, solar, and more. Free for cities, builders, and homeowners.

plugins.name: huntington-beach
plugins.description: Huntington Beach, CA — plan-check skills for simple permits with HBMC local amendments. Currently includes reroof, EV charger, and water heater. Tier 1 (vetted). More permit types coming.
